Package org.eventb.internal.core.parser

Class MainParsers

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.parser.MainParsers
public class MainParsers extends Object
Main parsers implement an algorithm for parsing a formula (or a part of a formula) without being bound to any particular operator.

As main parsers are null-denoted, they all implement INudParser.
